refs.purpose: Deterministically pick the next drafty step (or report no remaining work). The orchestrator owns the loop oracle so the harness reduces to `while draft: invoke skill`.
refs.trigger: At the start of every iteration, before any per-step work.
refs.verification: Cast the skill, run on a multi-step IWC-derived draft, confirm the orchestrator picks one step per call and exits when draft: false.

refs.purpose: Validate the mutated draft against draft-contract rules and, with --concrete, also gate the extracted concrete subset (including the step just implemented) against full gxformat2.
refs.trigger: After implementing or modifying the chosen step in the draft.
refs.verification: Cast the skill, exercise on an IWC-derived draft, confirm both draft-contract diagnostics and concrete-projection diagnostics route back to the step the iteration touched.

refs.purpose: Classify [[draft-validate]] diagnostics against wrapper-defined runtime failure semantics so the iteration routes back to the right authoring surface (implementation vs. wrapper choice).
refs.trigger: When draft-validate fails after a step has been implemented, or when a selected wrapper has explicit failure semantics that may surface at runtime.

refs.purpose: Bind the chosen step against the deterministic tool summary manifest emitted by [[summarize-galaxy-tool]] — read `parsed_tool` for ports/datatypes and `input_schemas.workflow_step_linked` for valid step `tool_state` shape.
refs.trigger: After a wrapper has been resolved for the chosen step and before implementing it.

produces.description: Same draft with one additional step concretized (one loop iteration). Once every step is concrete, [[draft-next-step]] reports `draft: false` and the harness exits the loop.

consumes.description: gxformat2 draft (see [[galaxy-workflow-draft-format]]) mutated in-place across iterations; topology is fully concrete, individual tool steps may still carry `TODO_*` sentinels and `_plan_*` planning fields.
